title: ocotea rohweri
intro: Ocotea rohweri, also known as Rohwer's Ocotea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as linalool and beta-caryophyllene, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ocotea rohweri include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and aromatherapy products. Ocotea rohweri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
